title: No totem
description: Its Resource pack where you cant see the totem
body:
🚫 No Totem Resourcepack  
Go minimalist—vanish the Totem of Undying from view entirely!  
This resourcepack removes the visual model of the totem, making it invisible when held or activated, perfect for clean HUDs or immersive gameplay.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces Totem of Undying with a fully transparent model and texture  
✅ No visual clutter during activation or offhand use  
🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks  
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing or toggling  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.16+
